message:
test(frankenterm-core): add 10 reply-engine property tests

Property-based invariant tests for terminal query/reply engine covering:
parse rejection of non-CSI, CursorPosition 1-indexing, DECXCPR format,
DeviceStatus/DA1 constancy, DA2 config usage, DECRPM status bounds,
determinism, VT sequence validity, and known-query roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
